features_added: Stripe subscription checkout (USD, monthly) — awareness $80, system $133
Self-checkout from hot lead detection (no human alert)
Trial activation without credit card (7-day expiry)
Autonomous Day 7 review (bot asks for feedback — notifyJake removed)
Zero WhatsApp number exposure in production code
Lazy Stripe initialiser (module loads without env var)
Pricing intent handler now sends Stripe link instead of WA link
ui_upgrades: All 6 CTAs in pricing + Jake + footer route to Stripe
Floating chat widget converted from WA to checkout trigger
Loading states on all checkout buttons
Ghost room activate CTA triggers parent.startCheckout()
Bento simulator post-booking CTA is now a checkout button
issues_found: stripe package initialised at module load — fixed with lazy getStripe()
fixes_applied: Replaced human handoff in reply-classifier with Stripe checkout
Removed 966570733834 from all production JS and HTML files
ADMIN_PHONE alert removed from hot lead handler
Lazy Stripe init prevents crash when dotenv not yet loaded

stripe_setup_required.STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY: Set in Render dashboard if needed on frontend

verification_checklist.1_checkout_creation: POST /api/create-checkout with test clinic → returns Stripe URL
verification_checklist.3_hot_lead: Send 'I am interested' to growth number → receives checkout link, no human alert
verification_checklist.4_simulator: Send 'demo' to growth number → 8-message in-chat demo, then checkout
verification_checklist.5_trial: Send 'TRIAL' to growth number → receives credentials, 7-day expiry
verification_checklist.6_no_jake_number: Search codebase for 966570733834 in *.js *.html → zero results
verification_checklist.7_day7: Fast-forward onboarding to Day 7 → bot asks for feedback, no human alert
verification_checklist.9_arabic: Set lang=ar, run full flow → all messages in Arabic
verification_checklist.10_error: Disconnect Stripe, try checkout → graceful error, retry button
